purposes.description: Assign operations to machines and determine start times to minimize makespan for a flexible job-shop scheduling problem with precedence, machine exclusivity, and downtime constraints

primitives.evidence: Must solve optimization under multiple constraints: precedence, machine exclusivity, and downtime windows
Must decompose scheduling into sub-steps: topological ordering, greedy assignment, and tie-breaking
Must compute earliest start times, end times, and makespan across multiple operations and machines
Must produce schedule.json with nested assignments array containing op_id, machine, start, end, and makespan
Must read the input problem JSON with jobs, machines, and downtime

alternative_paths.description: Write and execute a scheduling script instead of reasoning through the assignment mentally

primitives.evidence: Implement the greedy heuristic and constraint checking in Python
Execute the script to produce the schedule

purposes.description: Detect and fix constraint violations in an existing schedule by shifting operations forward until precedence, machine exclusivity, and downtime constraints are satisfied

primitives.evidence: Must detect violations across three constraint types and propagate fixes through dependent operations
Must recompute start/end times after shifting operations

purposes.description: Check that a proposed schedule satisfies all precedence, machine exclusivity, and downtime constraints

primitives.evidence: Must verify three constraint types across all operations: precedence ordering, no machine overlaps, no downtime overlaps
Must compare start/end times for consecutive operations
